• Procedural world generation, mining, building, and multiplayer sync via MQTT.
  • Rich UI with customizable textures, HUD gauges, minimap, chat, admin controls and shop.
  • Audio engine, save system, cloud sync, and dynamic modals (prompt, confirm, form, trade).
    const Game = new GameEngine();
    Game.init();

This HTML implements a tile‑based mining game where players move, drill, place blocks and trade items over a network. It includes a full UI overlay, sound manager, texture handling, shop, admin panel and a modular modal system for prompts and forms. The game runs on a canvas with a configurable HUD, minimap and mobile controls.
